nasb.text: Moses took half of the blood and put it in basins, and the other half of the blood he sprinkled on the altar.

esv.text: And Moses took half of the blood and put it in basins, and half of the blood he threw against the altar.

cnv.text: 摩西取了一半的血，盛在盆中；又取了另一半的血，灑在祭壇上。

ccb.text: 摩西把祭牲的血一半放在盆里，一半洒在坛上。
